summary: OpenNori now exposes build-vs-buy health as architecture.build_vs_buy in status/check/report/architecture show and as a doctor check named build_vs_buy_health; missing candidate fields or self-build reasons produce warnings and recovery actions.

sources.label: node --test --test-name-pattern 'architecture baseline loop|build-vs-buy health|context export' test/core.test.js
sources.command: node --test --test-name-pattern 'architecture baseline loop|build-vs-buy health|context export' test/core.test.js

reviewability: Run the listed targeted tests, then inspect architecture.build_vs_buy.status/findings and doctor check build_vs_buy_health.
limitations: This verifies OpenNori-owned health reporting; it does not mean every future infrastructure area has already been migrated to an external library. This was produced before joint user-agent build-vs-buy evaluation and must not be treated as completion evidence.
